subcodes.first_line: O ye real friends! This day is the day of the Glorious Bounties of the Invisible Kingdom of Abha and of the tumultuous waving of the seas
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی الیوم یوم فیوضات جلیله ملکوت غیب ابهاست و تموجات بحور الطاف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @development of capacity and readiness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
